basic_details.job_title: CNCI Security Guard Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Chittaranjan National Cancer Institute (CNCI), Kolkata - an Autonomous Institute under the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, Government of India - has released Advertisement No. CNCI/Outsourcing/2026/Security inviting applications from eligible Indian nationals for the post of Security Guard. The recruitment will be carried out through an outsourcing agency, M/s. Smart Security of India. This article covers every detail available in the official notification, including important dates, vacancy details, eligibility, salary, selection process, required documents, and how to apply.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years Age Relaxation: Relaxation of age equivalent to the number of years of experience will be given to candidates having higher experience, after meeting the essential eligibility criteria. | The notification does not specify a minimum age limit; only the maximum age limit of 55 years is mentioned.

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will be paid salary as per the Central Minimum Wage, through the outsourcing agency (M/s. Smart Security of India). The notification also states that PF, ESIC, and other statutory benefits will be paid as applicable. The exact salary figure/pay scale is not mentioned in the notification.

selection_process: All recruitment will be done on the recommendation of a duly constituted Screening Committee and Selection Committee. The Director
CNCI is the Competent Authority to finalize the engagement of the applicant. The decision of the Competent Authority in all matters of screening
and selection is final and binding.
The notification does not specify whether there will be a written test
or interview. These details are not available in the official document.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted offline in the prescribed format. Candidates can apply through either of the following modes:
By Post: Send the duly filled application form via Speed Post to: Office of the Director, Chittaranjan National Cancer Institute, Street No-299, DJ Block, Action Area-1D, Newtown, Kolkata – 700160.
By Email: The application form may also be sent to [email protected].

The application form requires candidates to fill in details such as name, father's/husband's name, address, contact information, date of birth, gender, category, academic qualifications, experience, and present employment status, along with a passport-size photograph.
important_instructions: Only eligible Indian Nationals can apply for this recruitment. Mere fulfilment of qualification and experience does not guarantee shortlisting; CNCI reserves the right to restrict the number of candidates called for the selection process. CNCI reserves the right to terminate the engagement of a selected candidate through the outsourcing agency without citing any reason; the candidate will have no claim for regular employment at the Institute. The engagement will initially be for up to one year at a time, with extension based on performance assessment and institutional requirement. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Suppressing information or submitting false/misleading information may lead to disqualification or termination at any stage. Candidates called for the selection process will not be entitled to any TA/DA (Travelling Allowance/Dearness Allowance). CNCI will communicate only with shortlisted and selected candidates; no correspondence will be entertained from candidates not shortlisted. Incomplete applications will be summarily rejected. Any disputes will be subject to the jurisdiction of competent courts in Kolkata. Candidates should regularly check the official CNCI website for any amendments, corrigendum, or addendum.

content_sections.heading: CNCI Security Guard Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: The recruitment will be carried out through an outsourcing agency, M/s. Smart Security of India. This article covers every detail available in the official notification, including important dates, vacancy details, eligibility, salary, selection process, required documents, and how to apply. content_sections.heading: CNCI Security Guard Recruitment 2026 Quick Overview
CNCI Security Guard Recruitment 2026: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Since the notification itself contains two different closing dates, candidates are strongly advised to apply well before 26.07.2026 to avoid any risk of rejection, and to keep checking the official CNCI website ( cnci.ac.in ) for any corrigendum or clarification.

rows.event: Last Date of Applications (as per the advertisement table)

content_sections.heading: CNCI Security Guard Recruitment 2026: Vacancy Details
CNCI Security Guard Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years Age Relaxation: Relaxation of age equivalent to the number of years of experience will be given to candidates having higher experience, after meeting the essential eligibility criteria. The notification does not specify a minimum age limit; only the maximum age limit of 55 years is mentioned.

content_sections.heading: CNCI Recruitment 2026: Salary
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will be paid salary as per the Central Minimum Wage, through the outsourcing agency (M/s. Smart Security of India). The notification also states that PF, ESIC, and other statutory benefits will be paid as applicable. The exact salary figure/pay scale is not mentioned in the notification.

content_sections.heading: CNCI Recruitment 2026: Selection Process
content_sections.text: The notification states that: All recruitment will be done on the recommendation of a duly constituted Screening Committee and Selection Committee. The Director, CNCI is the Competent Authority to finalize the engagement of the applicant. The decision of the Competent Authority in all matters of screening, shortlisting, and selection is final and binding. The notification does not specify whether there will be a written test, physical efficiency test, or interview. These details are not available in the official document.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for CNCI Security Guard Application
content_sections.text: As per the application form attached with the notification, candidates must enclose the following documents: Copy of Madhyamik/10th Certificate (as Proof of Age) Copy of Aadhaar Card Pension Payment Order / Release Order (for ex-servicemen/ex-personnel) Recent passport-size photograph (not less than 3 months old), to be affixed on the application form

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for CNCI Security Guard Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted offline in the prescribed format. Candidates can apply through either of the following modes: By Post: Send the duly filled application form via Speed Post to: Office of the Director, Chittaranjan National Cancer Institute, Street No-299, DJ Block, Action Area-1D, Newtown, Kolkata – 700160. By Email: The application form may also be sent to [email protected] . The application form requires candidates to fill in details such as name, father's/husband's name, address, contact information, date of birth, gender, category, academic qualifications, experience, and present employment status, along with a passport-size photograph.

content_sections.heading: CNCI Recruitment 2026: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only eligible Indian Nationals can apply for this recruitment. Mere fulfilment of qualification and experience does not guarantee shortlisting; CNCI reserves the right to restrict the number of candidates called for the selection process. CNCI reserves the right to terminate the engagement of a selected candidate through the outsourcing agency without citing any reason; the candidate will have no claim for regular employment at the Institute. The engagement will initially be for up to one year at a time, with extension based on performance assessment and institutional requirement. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Suppressing information or submitting false/misleading information may lead to disqualification or termination at any stage. Candidates called for the selection process will not be entitled to any TA/DA (Travelling Allowance/Dearness Allowance). CNCI will communicate only with shortlisted and selected candidates; no correspondence will be entertained from candidates not shortlisted. Incomplete applications will be summarily rejected. Any disputes will be subject to the jurisdiction of competent courts in Kolkata. Candidates should regularly check the official CNCI website for any amendments, corrigendum, or addendum.

faq.question: Q1. What is the CNCI Security Guard Recruitment 2026 about?
faq.answer: CNCI, Kolkata has invited applications for 10 vacancies of Security Guard, to be engaged through the outsourcing agency M/s. Smart Security of India, under Advertisement No. CNCI/Outsourcing/2026/Security.

faq.question: Q2. Who is eligible to apply for CNCI Security Guard posts?
faq.answer: Ex-servicemen, ex-policemen, or ex-paramilitary personnel who are Indian Nationals and meet the age and conduct criteria mentioned in the notification are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for CNCI Security Guard Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 55 years, with age relaxation equivalent to years of experience given to candidates with higher experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: The notification lists the qualification as "NA" — no specific educational qualification has been prescribed for this post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for CNCI Security Guard post?
faq.answer: Salary will be paid as per Central Minimum Wage, along with PF, ESIC, and other statutory benefits, through the outsourcing agency.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for CNCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for CNCI Security Guard Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline, either by Speed Post to the CNCI office in Newtown, Kolkata, or by email to [email protected], using the prescribed application format.

faq.question: Q8. What is the last date to apply for CNCI Security Guard Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The advertisement table mentions 28.07.2026 (5:00 PM) as the last date, while the "How to Apply" section mentions 26.07.2026 (5:00 PM) as the date by which the application must reach the office. Since the notification has this discrepancy, candidates are advised to apply before 26.07.2026 to be safe, and confirm with the official website.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required for the CNCI Security Guard application?
faq.answer: Copy of Madhyamik/10th Certificate (proof of age), copy of Aadhaar Card, Pension Payment Order/Release Order, and a recent passport-size photograph.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job at CNCI?
faq.answer: No. The notification clearly states that candidates will be engaged through the outsourcing agency only, initially for up to one year, and will have no claim to regular employment at the Institute.
